name: Spicy Wine Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef roast with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned meat in the crockpot.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (water, tomato sauce/ketchup, red wine, prepared mustard, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, dried mixed herbs) except for the chopped parsley.
4. Pour the mixture over the beef roast in the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 10 hours.
6. Remove the meat from the crockpot and slice it.
7. Thicken the sauce by stirring flour into a small amount of water until smooth.
8. Serve the sliced meat with the thickened sauce, garnished with chopped parsley.
